LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS DEFENDANT BALBOA TERRACE HOMES ASSOCIATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. THE COURT DENIES THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO FONG AND TOM'S CROSS COMPLAINT BECAUSE THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT REGARDING WHETHER BALBOA TERRACE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION ASSUMED A DUTY TO MAINTAIN THE SIDEWALKS PURSUANT TO THE BALBOA TERRACE HOMES ASSOCIATION AMENDED ARTICLES OF INCORPORATION BY-LAWS AND DEED RESTRICTIONS (MAY 1, 2001 EDITION). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS-COMPLAINANTS SUNY FONG AND LINDA TOM'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. THE AMENDMENTS DO NOT PREJUDICE BALBOA TERRACE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Leave To File Amended X-Complaint
Off Calendar May-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Sean Moriarty, Esq. and Stephen Barry, Esq. of Cesari Werner & Moriarty, Tel. 415.391.1113, for moving parties Fong & Tom;
Marguerite Meade, Esq. of Davis Law Firm, Tel. 415.278.1414, for opposing party Balboa Terrace Homes Association;
Conor M. Kelly, Esq. of Walkup Melodia Kelly & Schoenberger, Tel. 415.981.7210, for plaintiff.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. CROSS-COMPLAINANTS SUNY FONG and LINDA TOM'S Motion For Leave To File Amended Cross-Complaint is granted. The amendments do not prejudice Balboa Terrace Homeowners Association. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Marguerite Meade, Esq. of Davis Law Firm, Tel. 415.278.1414, for moving party Balboa Terrace Homes Association;
Sean Moriarty, Esq. and Stephen Barry, Esq. of Cesari Werner & Moriarty, Tel. 415.391.1113, for opposing parties Fong & Tom;
Conor M. Kelly, Esq. of Walkup Melodia Kelly & Schoenberger, Tel. 415.981.7210, for plaintiff.

RULING: A R G U E D. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on DEFENDANT BALBOA TERRACE HOMES ASSOCIATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. The Court denies the motion for summary judgment/summary adjudication as to Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint because there is a triable issue of material fact regarding whether Balboa Terrace Homeowners Association assumed a duty to maintain the sidewalks pursuant to the Balboa Terrace Homes Association Amended Articles of Incorporation By-Laws and Deed Restrictions (May 1, 2001 Edition). Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
